notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 via both WebFetch and curl (21 bytes). Consistent 403 pattern across all domains — custom + Vercel — confirms CDN/WAF IP-blocking of this checking environment, not actual downtime. Sites are reachable via TLS (SSL handshake succeeded for all). SSL WARNING: Certificates expire 2026-05-30 (29 days remaining), crossing the <30-day alert threshold today. Vercel auto-renews Let's Encrypt certs; renewal is expected but not yet confirmed. Action recommended: verify renewal has been triggered in Vercel dashboard.
